title: Creative Approval Request
description: Payload submitted by the buyer to the approval_webhook URL from acquire_rights. Contains the creative for rights holder review before distribution.

rights_id.description: Rights grant this creative was produced under

creative_id.description: Buyer-assigned creative identifier. Equivalent to OpenRTB crid. Used to track approval status across resubmissions.

creative_url.description: URL where the creative asset can be retrieved for review

creative_format.description: Format of the creative being submitted

description.description: Description of the creative for reviewer context

metadata.description: Additional creative metadata (duration, dimensions, target audience, etc.)

idempotency_key.description: Client-generated key for safe retries. Resubmitting with the same key returns the original response.
